channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Launches 400+ Drones in Daytime Attack on Ukraine
item.description: Russia launched more than 400 drones at Ukraine in a daytime attack, injuring 10 people in the western city of Ternopil, marking one of the largest drone assaults of the war.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Strikes Russian Tuapse Oil Terminal for Fourth Time
item.description: Ukrainian forces struck an oil terminal in the Russian Black Sea city of Tuapse, the fourth attack on the facility in two weeks, amid growing environmental concerns from oil spills.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Sends New Peace Proposal to US via Pakistan
item.description: Iran has submitted a revised proposal for negotiations with the United States through Pakistani mediators, as efforts continue to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Says "Probably" on Pulling US Troops from Italy and Spain
item.description: President Trump said he would probably consider withdrawing US troops from Italy and Spain, a day after announcing a review of military personnel reductions in Germany.

item.title: ⛽ Iran War Live: Tehran Offers New US Proposal as Costs Mount
item.description: Iran has offered a new proposal for talks with the US to end the war, as the Strait of Hormuz standoff continues to push oil prices higher and disrupt global energy markets.

item.title: 🤖 Pentagon secures deals with seven AI companies for classified military networks
item.description: The Defense Department reached agreements with major AI companies to deploy capabilities on classified networks, expanding AI providers across the military. Notably, Anthropic is not among the seven, amid ongoing federal litigation with the Pentagon.

item.title: 💰 Reuters investigation reveals Iranian elite family founded crypto exchange used by IRGC
item.description: Two brothers from the powerful Kharrazi family founded Nobitex, Iran's largest crypto exchange, which has become a central node for moving funds beyond US sanctions during the war. The exchange is used by the IRGC to transfer millions.

item.title: 🇩🇪 US troops in Germany highlight strategic value as Trump threatens pullback
item.description: Senior officers at US Army training facilities in Germany emphasized the benefits of American presence in the country, a day after Trump said he was reviewing whether to reduce troop numbers amid tensions over Europe's stance on Iran.

item.title: ⚔️ Atlantic alliance strains as US-Europe divide deepens over Iran and defense
item.description: The diplomatic fallout from the Iran conflict has exposed growing divisions between Washington and European allies. US Army training continues in NATO eastern flank nations even as political tensions escalate over European inaction on Iran.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Delivers New Peace Proposal to US via Pakistan
item.description: Iran has submitted a new proposal for talks with the United States through Pakistani mediators, state media reported, signaling a potential diplomatic opening amid the ongoing ceasefire and Hormuz standoff.

item.title: 🌍 The West's Moral Legitimacy Exhausted by Gaza and Lebanon
item.description: An opinion piece argues that Western support for Israel's actions in Gaza and Lebanon has depleted the West's moral legitimacy, and the Iran conflict is now straining its military credibility.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine launches army reform with higher military wages and contract changes
item.description: President Zelenskiy announced an "army reform" package including increased wages for military personnel, a strengthened contract system, and consideration of phased discharge for long-serving soldiers as Ukraine continues to fight Russia's invasion.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇦🇪 Israeli Iron Dome deployed to UAE as Iran war reshapes Middle East alliances
item.description: Israel secretly sent Iron Dome batteries and soldiers to the UAE during Iran's retaliation, marking unprecedented Israeli troop deployment in an Arab state. The UAE is distancing itself from traditional Arab allies and moving closer to Israel after feeling abandoned by Gulf states during the conflict.

item.title: 🏛️ House Speaker Johnson claims US is "not at war" with Iran as 60-day deadline passes
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson said Congress doesn't need to authorize military action because the US is "not at war" with Iran, despite the conflict nearing the 60-day War Powers Resolution threshold. The White House argues hostilities have "terminated" due to the ceasefire.

item.title: 🇩🇰 Danish company FLSmidth investigates potential Russia sanctions breach
item.description: Danish mining equipment supplier FLSmidth said it is investigating whether it failed to comply with sanctions after discovering it provided certain pre-contract tender materials to Russia, amid ongoing Western restrictions over the Ukraine war.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE Says Iran Cannot Be Trusted Over Hormuz Peace Efforts
item.description: Two months into the conflict, the UAE foreign minister stated that Iran cannot be trusted in negotiations over the Strait of Hormuz blockade. The blockade has choked off 20% of the world oil and gas supplies, pushing up global energy prices.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇪🇺 Trump Attacks European Leaders Over Iran Response
item.description: US President Donald Trump continued his criticism of German Chancellor Friedrich Merz, saying he was "doing a terrible job" and should spend less time interfering with Washington efforts on Iran. The attacks highlight worsening transatlantic relations.

item.title: 🇯🇵💴 Japanese Yen Surges After Suspected Intervention
item.description: The Japanese yen jumped sharply against the dollar on Friday, a day after Tokyo authorities were widely believed to have intervened to prop up the currency. The move highlights growing currency market volatility.

item.title: 🇸🇾🇷🇺 Syria Relies on Russian Oil Despite Western Pivot
item.description: Russia has emerged as the main supplier of oil to Syria despite the new government alignment with the West, Reuters reporting shows. The situation highlights complex regional energy dynamics amid the broader Middle East conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇯🇵 Ukraine Seeks Japanese Arms After Export Rules Eased
item.description: Japan relaxation of weapons-export rules opens a path for talks that could lead to Tokyo supplying military equipment to help Ukraine resist Russia invasion, Kyiv ambassador to Japan told Reuters.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan joins US-Philippines military drills in historic first since WWII
item.description: Japanese Ground Self-Defense Force personnel participated in the annual Salaknib exercise with US and Philippine forces, marking the first deployment of combat-ready Japanese troops in the Philippines since World War II amid growing regional deterrence against China.

item.title: 🇵🇰🇦🇫 Deadly Pakistan-Afghanistan border clashes kill dozens of soldiers
item.description: Pakistan reported 23 soldiers killed while the Taliban claimed 58 Pakistani and 9 Afghan soldiers dead in one of the deadliest border confrontations since the Taliban regained power in 2021, triggered by cross-border militant attacks.

item.title: 🇵🇰 Pakistani strikes hit Afghan university killing 7, Taliban reports
item.description: Mortars and missiles fired from Pakistan struck a university and civilian homes in northeastern Afghanistan, killing at least 7 and wounding 85, in the first major violence since China-mediated talks between the two sides.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇪🇺❄️ Trump attacks on European leaders worsen transatlantic frost
item.description: President Trump's criticism of European leaders deepens the rift in the transatlantic relationship. Comes amid discussions about reducing US troop presence in Germany and broader NATO tensions.

item.title: 🇹🇼🇨🇳🇺🇸 Taiwan concerned after China calls island biggest risk in US-China relations
item.description: Taiwan expressed concern after top US and Chinese diplomats held talks where Beijing stressed that the self-ruled island was the biggest risk factor in bilateral relations.
